message:
fix(types): Align list type inference with codegen output

Type inference must match codegen:
- Array [N]T for: constant, homogeneous, primitive, non-nested lists
- ArrayList for: everything else (dynamic, heterogeneous, nested)

This fixes the mismatch where type inference returned .list but codegen
produced arrays, causing ".items not found in [N]T" errors.

The fix mirrors genList's array optimization logic (collections.zig ~228)
in type inference to ensure consistency.
